templates.text: Today the stars favor you, {user}. Luck is knocking — open the door.
Winds of change are at your back, {user}. Take a step.
Today you'll succeed at what felt impossible yesterday, {user}.
Good news is flying your way, {user}. Listen for the ping.
This week, {user}, expect a small but genuinely happy victory.
Don't rush to conclusions, {user}: what looks like a setback is a gift.
Today your intuition is laser-sharp, {user}. Trust it.
On the horizon, {user}, a meeting that changes how you see people.
Quiet kindness you forgot will return to you today, {user}.
Money will arrive from where you don't expect it, {user}.
{user}, your next forest run will be generous.
The pipirik feels it: tomorrow is brighter than today, {user}.
Someone will think of you and smile today, {user}.
A small choice today will rearrange a big slice of life, {user}.
Luck is a habit, {user}. Today you pick it up.
{user}, a new opportunity is right around the corner. Turn your head.
The stars whisper: a bright streak is starting for you, {user}.
Today, {user}, something you've sought a while will quietly reveal itself.
{user}, your pipirik senses only good ahead.
Today there's a rare window, {user}. Make a wish in time.
Someone will praise you today, {user}, and they'll mean it.
The wise pipirik says: your chosen path is right, {user}.
{user}, don't decline today's invitation — it's fate.
Today is a day for bold moves, {user}. Be bold.
You'll be noticed where you didn't expect it, {user}.
The cosmos winks at you, {user}. Wink back.
Today the right people will hear your words, {user}.
{user}, you're half a step from a breakthrough. Keep going.
Luck loves the prepared, {user}. Today you are.
Someone you missed is coming back into your life, {user}.
{user}, remember: you're stronger than you think.
Today even the pebbles on the road will be on your side, {user}.
A small kindness now will return as great luck later, {user}.
{user}, the pipirik guardian is on duty just for you today.
A bright turn is coming within 24 hours, {user}.
Today you'll find what you considered hopelessly lost, {user}.
{user}, an evening surprise is queued up. Don't miss it.
Star advice: be generous today, {user} — it doubles back.
A letter of joy is flying toward you, {user}.
{user}, no doubt: your 'yes' today is the right one.
{user}, your pipirik grows faster than you think.
Today every centimeter of length will feel real, {user}.
{user}, don't measure your pipirik before sunset — surprise incoming.
The forest is generous on length to anyone named {user} today.
Thickness without length is dust; length without thickness is a straw. You're balanced, {user}.
{user}, your pipirik has a big day: it's near a new size.
Today you'll add more than expected, {user}. Don't panic.
{user}, length is earnable. Today's a good day to earn.
The stars say: by the end of the week you'll see a round number, {user}.
{user}, don't fear /forest today. The pipirik scents profit.
Length is not a destination but a path, {user}. Yet the destination is close.
{user}, your next /forest will yield an interesting drop.
Time to upgrade, {user}. Thickness is calling.
{user}, the pipirik hints: today is a day of long victories.
Don't miss the moment, {user}: the moment of length only catches the bold.
{user}, soon you'll outgrow an old friend in length. Brace for talks.
Forest spirits whisper your name today, {user}. That's luck.
{user}, don't waste length on the wind — spend wisely.
Today even a short pipirik feels grand, {user}.
{user}, you're at the threshold of a title you wanted.
One smart forest run today equals ten dumb ones, {user}.
{user}, every centimeter today counts double in meaning.
Today your pipirik is wiser than your mind. Listen, {user}.
{user}, length comes to those who can wait. To you too.
Soon you'll remember you started at 2 cm, {user}, and laugh.
{user}, your name's on the forest's lucky list today.
Don't begrudge the centimeters on the path to the dream, {user}.
{user}, the pipirik grows even in sleep. Especially today.
Today the forest brings what you've missed for weeks, {user}.
{user}, remember: length isn't about size — it's about the journey.
Say 'thank you' to the forest today, {user} — it'll hear.
{user}, your thickness is outpacing your length. That's rare.
Don't scare others with your stature, {user}. Boast tastefully.
{user}, today think twice before spending. Length will remember.
The pipirik sage forecasts: by month's end you'll hit a personal record, {user}.
{user}, small gains compound into big magic.
Today you'll feel the joy of growth, {user}, even on a small number.
{user}, length is winking at you. Wink back.
Walk into the forest with confidence, {user}. The forest believes in you.
{user}, you won't linger on this centimeter — the next one is calling.
Today the cat will look at you longer than usual, {user}. That's a sign.
{user}, your mug today will be exactly half full — that's perfect.
Don't buy a lottery ticket today, {user}. Use /forest instead.
{user}, the fridge holds a discovery you forgot yesterday.
Today you'll find a sock, {user}. Possibly even your own.
{user}, don't trust the black cat. Trust the red pipirik.
Traffic lights will be on your side today, {user}.
{user}, today's coffee will be stronger than usual. Take it as a sign.
Flip the pillow — find an idea, {user}.
{user}, don't sit on a three-legged stool today.
Star advice: do the dishes right away, {user} — karma boost.
{user}, wear something with buttons today. It'll work.
Don't open an old chat today, {user}. Seriously.
{user}, take out the trash before sunset, or luck will linger.
Be kind to the courier today, {user}. It pays back.
{user}, don't eat the last dumpling. Save it — it'll matter.
Today wear mismatched socks, {user} — it works.
{user}, slip a coin under the keyboard — your daily talisman.
Don't get up on the wrong foot today, {user}. Strictly the right one.
{user}, check your pockets. Something's there.
Today you'll remember a song you haven't heard in a decade, {user}.
{user}, drink water from the blue cup today. Important.
Don't argue with the printer today, {user}. It wins.
{user}, today's best idea will come in the shower. Don't lose it.
If you meet a pigeon — nod, {user}. It's a pipirik scout.
{user}, don't open an umbrella indoors. Still.
Today's food will be a notch better than usual, {user}.
{user}, don't step on cracks — old superstition works.
Look at the sky at least once today, {user} — clouds advise.
{user}, don't reply to a message from someone you don't remember.
Set the alarm a minute earlier, {user}. That minute is gold.
{user}, pet the cat today. No cat? Pet a pillow.
Don't buy seeds today, {user}. They can wait.
{user}, don't forget the charger. Phone's and yours.
Today's best place to think is the balcony, {user}.
{user}, don't lend a pen today — it might not come back.
Smile at the mirror tonight, {user}. The mirror will smile back.
{user}, promise not to eat cold pizza — bad omen for pipiriks.
Eat an apple today, {user}. Even if you don't want one.
{user}, check the remote's batteries. Just saying.
The ancients said: the pipirik is the measure of all things. Today you see why, {user}.
{user}, tonight's moonlight will land where you await a hint.
The starry wheel turns its face toward you, {user}.
{user}, in tonight's dream a sign will appear. Note its color.
Dark forces give you a wide berth today, {user}.
{user}, today is your soul's birthday. Congratulate yourself.
The third eye will crack open for a minute, {user}. Don't blink.
{user}, an ancestral pipirik in your karma awakens today.
Today whisper your wish to the wind, {user}. It'll carry.
{user}, gold lives inside you. The stars notice first.
Today is a good day to make peace with the past, {user}.
{user}, a new line will appear on your palm. Find it, learn it.
The moon waxes — and so do you, {user}.
{user}, tonight's sunset bonfire (even imagined) brings clarity.
An old pipirik ancestor smiles at you from beyond the clouds, {user}.
{user}, ancient power passes to you. Use it well.
Today you'll receive a sign — not from a person, {user}.
{user}, your amulet is hot to the touch today. That's normal.
The reading: ahead lies a field of possibilities, {user}.
{user}, don't step into the circle today — it'll bind you to a promise.
Powers of the pipirik come to you, {user}. Receive them with thanks.
{user}, at midnight think of something good — the stars record it.
Today you're closer to the essence than ever, {user}.
{user}, you're a knot in fate's thread. Today the knot loosens.
The ancients say: today's forest run is protected, {user}.
{user}, your guardian's on leave but left an instruction.
An old coin will bring luck, {user}, if you find it yourself.
{user}, don't miss three owls today — they're for you.
The forces of nature whisper your name, {user}.
{user}, the air today carries luck dust. Breathe deeply.
Don't light a candle without intent today, {user}. The candle dislikes idleness.
{user}, forest spirits will reward you when met.
An ancient pipirik oracle says: you're on the right path, {user}.
{user}, today the element of water is strong. Be near it — even mentally.
Luck spell: turn your mug three times — luck wakes, {user}.
{user}, an ancient sign will appear in the most ordinary form today.
Don't put anything heavy under your pillow today, {user} — it blocks magic.
{user}, you have a rare aura. Guard it from envy.
Today silence is golden, {user}.
{user}, the wise turtle sends a tip today: don't rush.
Today is a good day to forgive, {user}.
{user}, don't carry grudges — they always weigh more than the pipirik itself.
Today you'll see yourself through a friend's eyes, {user}. Be surprised.
{user}, do less — but better. Today's your quality day.
Today you're nearer to who you want to be, {user}.
{user}, every pipirik has its own pace. Don't compare.
A long road begins with a small step, {user}. Take it.
{user}, you're not late — you're right on time.
Today is for gratitude, {user}. Find three reasons.
{user}, breath is your first instrument. Use it.
Today one deep conversation beats ten empty ones, {user}.
{user}, do a small good deed today. Expect nothing.
Today think of someone who hasn't called in a while, {user}. Call first.
{user}, a tidy home is a tidy mind.
Today you're stronger than your doubts, {user}.
{user}, don't hide your light — the world is waiting.
Today is a good day to learn something new, {user}.
{user}, don't judge others by their worst day. Or yourself.
Today you'll re-rank what you thought important, {user}.
{user}, being yourself is the highest level-up.
Today you already have what you need, {user}. Just look.
{user}, slow doesn't mean bad. It means thoughtful.
Today hug someone, {user}. Free magic.
{user}, a small joy at breakfast guarantees a big day.
Today your 'no' is an act of self-love, {user}.
{user}, don't fear seeming kind. Kindness is power.
Listen to silence for a minute today, {user}. You'll catch a hint.
{user}, the world gets better just because you stepped outside.
Today someone needs your advice, {user}. Don't go silent.
{user}, mistakes aren't sentences — they're growth material.
Today smile first, {user}. It pays back.
{user}, you're never alone. Even when it feels otherwise.
Today is a day for small courage, {user}.
{user}, your version of success is the only correct one.
Today look at an old photo, {user}. You'll meet a new self.
{user}, don't forget to drink water. The pipirik appreciates it.
Today do what you've been postponing, {user}. At least halfway.
{user}, you don't owe everyone your charm. Especially today.
Today one good habit beats ten grand plans, {user}.
{user}, you deserve good things. Today especially.
{user}, you'll meet an old acquaintance today. Don't walk past.
Today's task is just to rest, {user}. That's work too.
{user}, your pipirik can sing. You'll catch the tune today.
Today you'll fix something small and feel like a hero, {user}.
{user}, take a longer shower today. It's therapy.
Try a dish you used to fear today, {user}.
{user}, today you have the kind of face everyone likes.
Today calling mom is wonderful, {user}. Truly.
{user}, your laugh today is the best currency.
Today there'll be a sale somewhere, {user}. Guess where.
{user}, iron a fresh shirt. Power!
Today you'll see a smile that warms you, {user}.
{user}, don't miss the rainbow. Even if you have to look.
Today write down one thought, {user}. A year from now you'll appreciate it.
{user}, take a mirror selfie with the pipirik. For memory.
Today's day for a tiny adventure, {user}. The tiniest.
{user}, today's breakfast will be a small masterpiece.
Today high-five yourself, {user}. You won't be wrong.
{user}, today a sunrise is great — even from the window.
Today your pipirik gains a touch more importance, {user}.
